Interface ReduceProvider

All Superinterfaces:
AlgorithmProvider
public interface ReduceProvider extends AlgorithmProvider
Reduction operation algorithm provider.

Provides parallel reduction operations (sum, max, min, product) with CPU and GPU implementations.

Since:
1.2
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default String
    getAlgorithmType()
    Returns the unique category of the algorithm.
    double
    reduce(String operation, DoubleBuffer input, int size)
    Reduces an array to a single value (sum, max, min, etc.).

    Methods inherited from interface AlgorithmProvider

    getName, getPriority, isAvailable, score

  • Method Details

    • reduce

      double reduce(String operation, DoubleBuffer input, int size)
      Reduces an array to a single value (sum, max, min, etc.).
      Parameters:
      operation - Reduction operation: "sum", "max", "min", "prod"
      input - Input buffer
      size - Number of elements
      Returns:
      Reduced value

    • getAlgorithmType

      default String getAlgorithmType()
      Description copied from interface: AlgorithmProvider
      Returns the unique category of the algorithm.
